name: Mackworth Outdoor Stacking Patio Club Chair White - Threshold™
description:
Kick back in the outdoors in this Mackworth Outdoor Stacking Patio Club Chair from Threshold™. This club chair features raised arms and showcases a brown vertical rattan-like woven design on the round, open backrest and seat to add textural appeal to your patio or deck. It's paired with a sleek white steel frame with a powder-coated, E-coated finish, boasting weather- and rust-resistant properties to stand up to the elements. Plus, the stackable design makes storage simple and space-efficient.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
